'''Dren Kuu'la''' was a former [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] dancer who became a personal escort and a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]]. She was very loyal to the beings she guarded.

{{Char-stub}}
